Package noppes.npcs.api.handler.data

Interface IPlayerMail

  • public interface IPlayerMail
    Represents a mail message sent to a player, containing pages of text, sender info, optional quest, and item attachments.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      IItemStack[] getItems()  
      int getPageCount()  
      String[] getPageText()  
      IQuest getQuest()  
      String getSender()  
      String getSubject()  
      long getTimePast()  
      long getTimeSent()  
      boolean hasQuest()  
      void setItems​(IItemStack[] items)  
      void setPageText​(String[] pages)
      Sets the page text content.
      void setSender​(String sender)  
      void setSubject​(String subject)  

    • Method Detail

      • setPageText

        void setPageText​(String[] pages)
        Sets the page text content.
        Parameters:
        pages - an array of strings, one per page.

      • getPageText

        String[] getPageText()
        Returns:
        the page text as an array of strings.

      • getPageCount

        int getPageCount()
        Returns:
        the number of pages.

      • setSender

        void setSender​(String sender)
        Parameters:
        sender - the sender name.

      • getSender

        String getSender()
        Returns:
        the sender name.

      • setSubject

        void setSubject​(String subject)
        Parameters:
        subject - the mail subject line.

      • getSubject

        String getSubject()
        Returns:
        the mail subject line.

      • getTimePast

        long getTimePast()
        Returns:
        milliseconds since the mail was sent.

      • getTimeSent

        long getTimeSent()
        Returns:
        the timestamp when the mail was sent.

      • hasQuest

        boolean hasQuest()
        Returns:
        true if this mail has an associated quest.

      • getQuest

        IQuest getQuest()
        Returns:
        the quest attached to this mail, or null if none.

      • getItems

        IItemStack[] getItems()
        Returns:
        the item attachments.

      • setItems

        void setItems​(IItemStack[] items)
        Parameters:
        items - the item attachments.
